security_controls.assessment: No authentication library (passport, jsonwebtoken, bcrypt) in dependencies. No auth middleware in source. Authentication entirely absent.
No session management library (express-session, cookie-session) in dependencies. No JWT signing/verification library present.
No RBAC or access control library (express-acl, casbin, etc.) in dependencies. No authorization middleware detected.
Sequelize ORM (v6.37.1) declared as dependency — provides parameterized query capability. However, no source code present to verify actual usage vs. raw query patterns.
No input validation library (joi, zod, express-validator, yup) in dependencies. Validation absence is a design-level gap.
No output encoding library detected. No template engine with auto-escaping (handlebars, ejs with escaping) declared.
helmet package not in dependencies. No CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, or other security headers will be set by default with plain Express.
cors package not in dependencies. Express default behavior may allow all origins depending on request handling.
No bcrypt, argon2, or scrypt library in dependencies. No credential storage library present.
Dockerfile exposes port 3000 with no TLS configuration. No TLS termination or HTTPS setup in project files.

security_controls.domain: File Parser and Outbound Request Controls
security_controls.assessment: express-rate-limit or equivalent not in dependencies. No DoS protection at the application layer.
Dockerfile runs as root (no USER directive — IF-002 violation). Mutable base image tag (IF-007 violation). No capability dropping. No read-only filesystem. npm install without --ignore-scripts.
No package-lock.json or yarn.lock (SC-002 violation). lodash@4.17.10 has known prototype pollution CVEs (CVE-2019-10744, CVE-2020-8203). No CI/CD pipeline for automated SCA.

security_controls.domain: Operations Runtime and Supply Chain Controls
security_controls.assessment: Automated SCA scanning not detected in the repository. Patch-management posture depends on this control being in place — the team is reactive rather than proactive without it.

security_controls.domain: Operations Runtime and Supply Chain Controls
security_controls.assessment: Automated dependency updates not detected in the repository. Patch-management posture depends on this control being in place — the team is reactive rather than proactive without it.

security_controls.domain: Operations Runtime and Supply Chain Controls
security_controls.assessment: Lockfile hygiene not detected in the repository. Patch-management posture depends on this control being in place — the team is reactive rather than proactive without it.
